channel.title: xkcd.com
channel.description: xkcd.com: A webcomic of romance and math humor.

img.title: We definitely put the pool in a mine for shielding. It was absolutely not to hide it from the funding people.
img.alt: We definitely put the pool in a mine for shielding. It was absolutely not to hide it from the funding people.

img.title: They rounded down to 182.8 instead of rounding up to 182.9 because 182.9 might make the statement incorrect.
img.alt: They rounded down to 182.8 instead of rounding up to 182.9 because 182.9 might make the statement incorrect.

img.title: Remember, your answers to the physics census are confidential; we will not be issuing Pauli exclusion principle citations.
img.alt: Remember, your answers to the physics census are confidential; we will not be issuing Pauli exclusion principle citations.

img.title: Usain Bolt holds the world record in the 100 meter speedrun.
img.alt: Usain Bolt holds the world record in the 100 meter speedrun.
